title: rubus pseudohirtus
intro: Rubus pseudohirtus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus pseudohirtus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Rubus pseudohirtus can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
